title: Bureavella endlicheri
taxonomy: Bureavella endlicheri is a type of flowering plant classified within the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Bureavella, which is a part of the order Gentianales. Further classification places Bureavella endlicheri within the subclass Asteridae and the class Magnoliopsida. The plant is native to specific regions and is characterized by its unique characteristics. Bureavella endlicheri is considered a distinct species within the Apocynaceae family.

properties: Bureavella endlicheri, also known as the Australian sandpaper fig, has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its therapeutic properties.
